title: #amytangerine | Instagram + Elle's Studio kits giveaway
excerpt: There are nearly 4000 photos on Instagram using the hashtag #amytangerine. We love seeing these! from left to right, top to bottom 1. @happiescrappie | 2. @itsadesignlife | 3. @bettiescrapbook | 4. @vcu23 | 5. @violeta_scrap | 6. @melmarilyn |…
body:
There are nearly 4000 photos on Instagram using the hashtag #amytangerine. We love seeing these!

Elle’s Studio is excited to announce that they now have a monthly kit full of exclusive and limited edition tags! The best part about this kit is that it will work for you, no matter what you enjoy making. Each kit will include tags that you can use for layouts, mini books, cards, and of course, Project Life! You'll get a mix of tags that you will not find anywhere else, or in any of their collections. Most tags will be tags you can use for everyday themes, and there will even be some seasonal and monthly tags in the mix, too! Each month look for a mix of sizes and shapes, and anywhere from around 20 to 25 tags - the perfect amount to keep you busy all month long!

Each month, the limited edition kits will go on sale on the 10th at 8:00 am PST, at their website (after midnight on the 10th they go up to $11.99). These kits will be able to ship first class: shipping for USA residents will start around $2.00 and go up from there, depending on the weight of what is in your cart. For overseas, it will run about $6+ depending on your location.

Once these kits sell out, they will not be restocking, so make sure you mark your calendar or join their newsletter list to receive a reminder of when they go live each month. And, don’t forget that their brand new collections, Cameron and Saltwater, is available now, too, and are both perfect for summer!

You can also visit Elle’s Studio blog | Facebook | Twitter | Pinterest | Instagram

Giveaway: Three people will each win an exclusive and limited edition July kit from Elle’s Studio. TO ENTER: Simply leave a comment. Giveaway will close Saturday, July 13th at 7am PST and winners will be announced shortly after on this post. GOOD LUCK!

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED - The winners are #26 - Annette Allen, #64 - Carla Hundley, and #153 - Suzie. CONGRATS!
